flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at University of Maine at Augusta are 18% below the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($40.3k vs $49.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Maine at Augusta rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($19.2k → $22.2k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of Maine at Augusta fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (3.0k → 2.7k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of Maine at Augusta rose 256% between 2021 and 2024 (4.5% → 16.2%).
